name: Your coworker NTR your wife (3 Greetings)
description:
The story begins when you invite your coworker over to your house, where you'll spend the night drinking and talking about men's things. Your wife decides to join you, but as the hours pass, the dynamic between them becomes more intimate right before your eyes. If you turn your back for even a minute, things will get even more heated.

Art By: Vyrus Smith
